utterances.speaker: Cecilia
utterances.text: You know what ? It does not matter ! Because it is not true !

utterances.speaker: Cecilia
utterances.text: And if it were true , how dare you come to me ask me for tips about a character that I’ve been playing for 20 years ... I’ll give you a tip !

emotion_cause.span: 3_if it were true , how dare you come to me ask me for tips about a character that I’ve been playing for 20 years

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Ms . Monroe ... Oh there you go .
